title: Disclosure of Exceptions Approved by the Minister Under Section 6.3.7 of the Policy on Transfer Payments - Canada.ca
content:
## Disclosure of exceptions approved by the minister under section 6.3.7 of the policy on transfer payments
There is a requirement to disclose exceptions approved by a minister under section 6.3.7 of the Policy on Transfer Payments in a transparent manner. The deputy head is to ensure public disclosure.

## Section 6.3.7 Disclosure
The Minister of Health has approved the following exception to terms and conditions to provide a transfer payment to an individual recipient of an amount up to 25 per cent in excess of the maximum amount authorized by approved terms and conditions.
Government of Ontario
The Safe Voluntary Isolation Sites Program provides Grants and Contributions to eligible organizations. The maximum amount authorized by the Terms and Conditions of the Program is $20,000,000 per recipient organization, per fiscal year.
The Minister, under Section 6.3.7 of the Treasury Board Policy on Transfer Payments has authorized an increase of 5 per cent to the maximum transfer payment amount to Government of Ontario of $21,000,000.
